_comment: Z7 cold-start estimator seeds. Cost in USD, time in hours. These values are intentionally rough — they exist so EstimateSlot is non-empty before the learned model has training data. Per AI2a, defaults serve until N=10 completions accumulate per {tenant,template}; after that, the learned model takes over. Tune by editing this file (or override via configuration).
_severity_comment: Multiplier applied to cost AND time. Critical = riskier + slower; Info = trivial cleanup.
